This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Saccolabium rhopalorrhachis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
